name: Anhui Jiangnan Chemical Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Anhui Jiangnan Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. researches, produces, and sells explosives in China. The company offers explosives, including emulsion, powdery emulsion, expanded ammonium nitrate, and modified ammonium explosives; and on-site mixed explosives, such as porous ammonium, mixed emulsion, and heavy ammonium fry explosives. It also provides explosive products comprising source columns, detonating cords, and detonating tube detonators. In addition, the company offers engineering blasting services, which include mine, tunnel, earth and stone, and demolition blasting services; and blasting products, such as emulsifiers, polycrystalline diamonds, nano cerium oxide, and explosive compounds. Further, it develops, constructs, and operates wind farms and photovoltaic power plants. Anhui Jiangnan Chemical Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1985 and is based in Hefei, China.
